hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "wrangler (deploy|publish)" && echo "[hook] REMINDER: Run build before deploying: npm run build" || true'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.claude/CLAUDE\.md" && echo "[hook] CLAUDE.md modified — verify phase tracker is updated" || true'
